prompts.user: Apply the same two-stage physical test to every case. Stage 1: use only the constitutive equation, not associations with material names, to determine the monotonic sign of the response with respect to the changed control while all other quantities are fixed. For electrical resistance versus conductor area, the response is electrical resistance R_e, the control is cross-sectional area A, and the relation is R_e A = rho L, with rho and L fixed. All stated coefficients are positive. Complete this relation-sign step silently. § Stage 2: in a printed conductor of fixed length, cross-sectional area A changes from 0.02 mm^2 to 0.2 mm^2. Determine the sign of this numerical change silently. ¶ Now compose the relation sign with the numerical-change sign to determine the direction of electrical resistance R_e. † Reply with exactly one lowercase word from this ordered pair: lower, higher.

prompts.law_name: optical penetration depth versus absorption coefficient
prompts.system: an absorbing semiconductor
